description_long: This is a medium-sized rectangular cardboard parcel with a brown, fibrous exterior typical of shipping boxes. The front face features a white shipping label bordered in red and white stripes, displaying a red circular symbol and recipient information, including the name 'Mr. Andriy Zelensky' and an address in Kyiv, Ukraine. Two of the side faces each display a white label with two bold red upward-pointing arrows, indicating the correct upright orientation for handling. The rear face is plain, with no markings or labels. The box appears to be sealed and is likely hollow, designed to contain and protect items during transit. Its construction suggests it is lightweight but sturdy enough for shipping purposes.
description: A brown cardboard shipping parcel with a red-bordered label on the front and red 'up' arrow labels on two sides, designed for safe transport.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main shipping label with recipient details and a red circular symbol.
description_view_1: This side view displays a white label with two red upward arrows, indicating the upright orientation.
description_view_2: The rear view is plain brown cardboard with no visible markings or labels.
description_view_3: This side view is identical to view 1, showing the same 'up' arrow label.
